meta_description: Create a dental website with online booking, price list, and patient reviews. Fast, no code, with professional medical design. Promto.
h1: Dental Website — Online Booking and Patient Trust
og_description: Attract patients to your dental practice with a modern website. Online booking, price list, team of dentists. Create free on Promto.
hero_title: Dental Website — Online Booking and Patient Trust
hero_subtitle: A modern website helps patients find your dental practice and book appointments online.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Dental Practice
how_it_works.description: Enter the name, services, and address — AI will create the structure and content.

how_it_works.title: Add Team and Pricing
how_it_works.description: Upload doctor photos, set prices, and operating hours through a simple editor.

how_it_works.title: Publish and Accept Patients
how_it_works.description: Choose a domain and launch — online booking starts working immediately.

faq.question: How do I add a price list to the dental website?
faq.answer: The editor has a pricing block. Enter services and prices — they'll display as a convenient table for patients.

faq.question: Can I show before and after photos of work?
faq.answer: Yes, a before/after gallery is a standard block for dental practices. Upload photos directly in the editor.

faq.question: How do I enable online booking?
faq.answer: The booking form activates in settings. You receive applications by email or messenger.

faq.question: Do I need to publish the license on the website?
faq.answer: Yes, by law, medical organization websites must display their license. Promto includes a section for documents.

faq.question: How much does a dental website cost?
faq.answer: Website creation is free. Paid plans add custom domain, advanced forms, and analytics.

faq.question: Can I edit the website myself?
faq.answer: Yes, the editor requires no coding knowledge. Edit text, photos, and blocks anytime.

cta_mid_subtitle: Patients from search engines will be booking with you from day one.
cta_final_subtitle: Create a professional dental website for free on Promto.
